definitions.vi: Sắc thái hoặc tông màu chủ đạo của một vật hoặc không gian.
definitions.en: The dominant shade or color tone of an object or space.
definitions.es: La sombra dominante o el tono de color de un objeto o espacio.

example.vi: Phòng khách dùng tông màu sáng.
example.en: The living room uses a light color tone.
example.es: La sala de estar usa un tono de color claro.

exampleSentences: Chị thích chọn quần áo có cùng tông để nhìn hài hòa hơn.
Em thấy phòng khách này dùng tông sáng nên rất dễ chịu.
Anh muốn sơn phòng ngủ với tông xanh để cảm thấy thư giãn.

translation.en: The room has a blue color tone.

notes:
tông = tone, shade, overall color feeling. It’s about the general color vibe, not one exact color.

It’s a noun. You’ll usually hear tông màu (color tone), and phrases like cùng tông (matching tones), lệch tông (clashing), tông sáng / tông trầm (light / dark tone). No classifier needed in normal use.

It can also mean musical key in music (tông cao, tông thấp), but in daily life it’s most often about colors and design.

Strong memory link: think “tone” in English — same idea, just Vietnamese spelling.
notes_md:
**tông** = tone, shade, overall color feeling. It’s about the general color vibe, not one exact color.

It’s a noun. You’ll usually hear **tông màu** (color tone), and phrases like **cùng tông** (matching tones), **lệch tông** (clashing), **tông sáng / tông trầm** (light / dark tone). No classifier needed in normal use.

It can also mean **musical key** in music (tông cao, tông thấp), but in daily life it’s most often about colors and design.

Strong memory link: think “tone” in English — same idea, just Vietnamese spelling.
exampleSentencesTranslated: She likes to choose clothes with the same color tone to look more harmonious.
I think this living room uses a light color tone so it's very comfortable.
He wants to paint the bedroom with a blue color tone to feel relaxed.

content.sentence: Hãy chọn các ___ màu giống nhau.
